items.title: Messi says 'pain is immense' after losing World Cup final
items.summary: Lionel Messi says "the pain is immense" and that it "will take time to heal" after Argentina lost 1-0 to Spain in the World Cup final.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 2026 SEC Media Days schedule, where to watch: When coaches, teams take stage during four-day kickoff event
items.summary: The rundown for the unofficial kickoff to SEC football season ahead of fall camp
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England fightback falls short as fluctuating Youth Test ends in draw
items.summary: England stutter to 144 for 5 in reply to 460 at end of second day in Hove
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
